summary: V4 testing complete. All Stripe Checkout and Resend email features tested. Backend: 33 tests passed (10 new payment tests + 23 existing). Fixed payment status endpoint to handle expired Stripe sessions gracefully. Frontend: Deposit page renders correctly with $129 amount, form validation works, Stripe checkout redirect works, polling UI shows correctly, cancelled banner displays. Fixed missing 'Pay 10% deposit' link in PackageDetail bottom CTA section. All V1/V2/V3 features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test payment transactions created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 features fully tested: (1) Stripe Checkout integration - POST /api/payments/checkout creates session and returns checkout.stripe.com URL, GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} returns payment status with graceful fallback for expired sessions. (2) Resend email hook - graceful no-op when RESEND_API_KEY is empty, logs 'RESEND_API_KEY not set — skipping lead notification email.' (3) Frontend Deposit page at /deposit/:slug with form validation, Stripe redirect, polling UI, cancelled banner. (4) PackageDetail page has 'Pay 10% deposit' links in both hero (data-testid='hero-pay-deposit') and bottom CTA (data-testid='bottom-pay-deposit'). All V1/V2/V3 features verified working: home page, packages, filters, currency toggle, FAQ, admin dashboard, language switcher.

features_tested.backend_payments_packages_returns_4: PASS - Returns real-sri-lanka ($129), hidden-lanka ($159), slow-and-savour ($118), quick-escape ($69) all USD
features_tested.backend_payments_status_valid_session: PASS - Returns correct fields with graceful fallback for expired sessions
features_tested.backend_trip_inquiries_resend_graceful_n: PASS - Returns 201, logs 'RESEND_API_KEY not set — skipping lead notification email.'
features_tested.frontend_deposit_page_renders: PASS - Shows package summary, $129 deposit amount, name/email form, pay button
features_tested.frontend_deposit_invalid_slug: PASS - Shows 'Package not found' with back-home link
features_tested.frontend_deposit_form_validation: PASS - HTML5 validation triggers on empty fields
features_tested.frontend_deposit_checkout_redirect: PASS - Redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount
features_tested.frontend_deposit_cancelled_banner: PASS - Shows 'Payment cancelled — no charge was made' banner
features_tested.frontend_deposit_polling_ui: PASS - Shows 'Confirming your payment...' with attempt counter
features_tested.regression_home_page: PASS - Loads correctly with navigation, packages, language switcher
features_tested.regression_admin_dashboard: PASS - Login works, shows leads table with stats
features_tested.regression_package_detail: PASS - Itinerary accordion, what's included, sticky CTA all working

mocked_apis.instagram_feed: MOCKED - Uses static tiles from siteData.EXPERIENCES
mocked_apis.resend_email: DORMANT - Awaiting user RESEND_API_KEY (graceful no-op confirmed)

fixes_applied.issue: GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} was returning 500 when Stripe session expired
fixes_applied.fix: Added try/catch around stripe.get_checkout_status() to return cached DB state on error

fixes_applied.issue: Missing 'Pay 10% deposit' link in bottom CTA section
fixes_applied.fix: Added Link component with data-testid='bottom-pay-deposit' pointing to /deposit/<slug>
